positive: A vibrant, symmetrical illustration of a stylized mountain range viewed at dawn. The mountains are depicted with varying geometric layers, ranging from deep indigo and ultramarine blue to lighter cerulean, creating strong atmospheric perspective. In the foreground, a pair of minimalist, abstract pine trees are rendered with clean, solid silhouettes against a gradient sky of soft apricot, rose gold, and pale orange. The overall style is a sophisticated, modern graphic design aesthetic, reminiscent of Japanese ukiyo-e meets Mid-Century Modern illustration. The composition must be centered and highly adaptable for apparel printing, emphasizing clean lines, flat color fields, and high contrast between the dark silhouettes and the bright sky. The light source is implied to be coming from behind the peaks, creating clean, dramatic edges and strong tonal contrast.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, text, watermark, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, realistic photography, photorealism
